description: Registry of all 3 Axion control planes: modules, boundaries, and artifact contracts.

control_planes.name: Internal Control Plane
control_planes.description: Orchestrates the deterministic build pipeline from intake through packaging. Owns run lifecycle, state machine, gate evaluation, and artifact production.

modules.name: RunController
modules.description: Run lifecycle orchestrator: create, advance, gate, release, fail, archive.

modules.name: JSONRunStore
modules.description: Persistent run state storage with JSON file I/O.

modules.name: RegistryLoader
modules.description: Loads and validates all registries, resolves pinsets deterministically.

modules.name: StandardsEngine
modules.description: Computes standards applicability and resolves a single snapshot.

modules.name: TemplateDriver
modules.description: Selects, renders, and packages templates into envelopes.

modules.name: GateEngine
modules.description: Evaluates gate predicates against artifacts and evidence.

modules.name: ProofSystem
modules.description: Captures proof objects and maintains append-only proof ledger.

modules.name: KitPackager
modules.description: Packages run artifacts into a distributable kit bundle.

modules.name: AuditLogger
modules.description: Records operator actions with override tracking and expiry.

modules.name: ReleaseManager
modules.description: Creates, signs, publishes, and revokes releases.

modules.name: PinManager
modules.description: Manages artifact version pins and resolves pinsets.

modules.name: OutputWriter
modules.description: Writes all ICP output artifacts (O-01 through O-10).

modules.name: FailureClassifier
modules.description: Classifies failures, builds failure reports, determines fail-fast behavior.

modules.name: DeterminismEngine
modules.description: Normalizes run context, isolates noise fields, enables golden comparisons.

hard_rules: No stage may be skipped without explicit SKIP + recorded reason
Gate results are immutable once written
All state transitions must be validated by the state machine
Pinset is frozen at run start

control_planes.name: Kit Control Plane
control_planes.description: Manages kit-local execution lifecycle: validates kits, tracks work units, runs verification commands, captures proofs, and enforces guardrails.

modules.name: KitValidator
modules.description: Validates kit structure, schema compliance, entrypoint, and pinset presence.

modules.name: WorkUnitManager
modules.description: Loads plan units, enforces 1-target rule, tracks unit status, recommends next unit.

modules.name: VerificationRunner
modules.description: Executes verification commands (lint, test, build, typecheck) and captures output.

modules.name: ResultWriter
modules.description: Writes RESULT files per work unit with implementation and proof references.

modules.name: ProofCapture
modules.description: Captures kit-local proofs and writes kit-local proof ledger.

modules.name: ExecutionGuardrails
modules.description: Checks forbidden paths, external agent restrictions, plagiarism/reuse, and secrets/PII.

modules.name: KitRunReport
modules.description: Builds comprehensive kit run report from all KCP module outputs.

modules.name: KCPStateMachine
modules.description: Validates KCP state transitions (READY→EXECUTING→VERIFYING→COMPLETE/BLOCKED/FAILED).

hard_rules: Each work unit targets exactly 1 artifact
Result files require non-empty implementation_refs and proof_refs for DONE status
External agents cannot modify ICP artifacts
Proof ledger is append-only within the kit

control_planes.name: Maintenance Control Plane
control_planes.description: Manages post-delivery maintenance lifecycle: dependency upgrades, migrations, test hardening, refactoring, CI maintenance, and Axion compatibility checks.

modules.name: DependencyManager
modules.description: Applies version bumps, updates lockfiles, detects breaking changes.

modules.name: MigrationManager
modules.description: Generates and applies migration plans with backcompat checks.

modules.name: TestMaintainer
modules.description: Adds regression tests, triages flakes, assesses coverage.

modules.name: RefactorManager
modules.description: Plans and applies refactors with impact assessment and contract preservation.

modules.name: CIMaintainer
modules.description: Updates CI workflows and validates doctor/verify checks preserved.

modules.name: AxionCompat
modules.description: Validates Axion artifact compatibility and kit output validity.

modules.name: MaintenanceRunner
modules.description: Orchestrates maintenance runs by interpreting mode and executing modules.

modules.name: MCPStateMachine
modules.description: Validates MCP state transitions (PLANNED→APPLYING→VERIFYING→COMPLETE/BLOCKED/FAILED/ROLLBACKING).

hard_rules: All changes must be scoped by ScopeConstraints
Rollback strategy must be recorded before applying changes
Contract preservation is mandatory for refactors
CI changes must preserve existing verification checks
